description_long: This shotgun features a robust, industrial design with a predominantly dark metallic body accented by orange and green elements. The barrel assembly is thick and cylindrical, with visible dual tubes running parallel, suggesting a double-barrel configuration. The rear section includes a compact, angular stock and a pistol grip, both designed for ergonomic handling. A blue cylindrical component is mounted on the top, possibly representing a sight or gas system. The trigger area is protected by a squared, reinforced guard, and the overall construction appears solid and utilitarian. The finish is mostly matte with some glossy highlights, giving it a modern tactical appearance.
description: A heavy, double-barreled shotgun with a dark metallic body, orange accents, and a compact, angular stock. Features a squared trigger guard and a blue top-mounted component.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, dual barrels, orange accent panel, and blue top-mounted component.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrel openings and the squared muzzle, with the stock and grip mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the dual barrels and stock shape.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the angular stock, pistol grip, and the squared trigger guard, with barrels extending away.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with parallel tubes and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_stock_type: pistol grip with compact, angular stock
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, reinforced trigger guard with a broad, angular profile
